import.replaceConfirm: A package with this id already exists. Replace it?

search.noMatchesLibrary: No matches in the library. Try another word.
search.noMatchesTab: No matches in this tab. Try another word.

empty.libraryText: Create your first world, then build stories and characters on top of it.
empty.worldsText: There are no worlds yet. Create one in the studio or import a package.
empty.storiesText: There are no stories yet. Create one in the story studio over a world.
empty.charactersText: There are no characters yet. Create one in the studio or import a .gmchar file.

delete.worldNote: The world will be removed from the library. Game chats and the current session will not change. Stories and characters based on this world will remain, but lose its source material. This cannot be undone.
delete.storyNote: The story will be removed from the library. Saved games will not change. Characters based on this story will remain, but lose its source material. This cannot be undone.
delete.characterNote: The character will be removed from the library. Saved games will not change because their snapshots are self-contained. This cannot be undone.

wizard.connectorModelAria: Connector and model for the new game
wizard.chooseWorldLead: Choose a world from the library or a built-in classic.
wizard.noWorlds: There are no worlds yet. Create one in the studio.
wizard.builtinStoryLead: A built-in classic includes its story.
wizard.proceduralDescription: A living world is generated from the world bible at launch.
wizard.characterLeadProcedural: A procedural campaign needs a character from the library.
wizard.characterLeadWithProtagonist: Choose a character. The story protagonist is selected by default.
wizard.characterLeadWithoutProtagonist: This story has no ready protagonist. Choose a character from the library.
wizard.protagonistDescription: A ready hero defined by the story author.
wizard.noCharacters: There are no characters yet. Create one in the studio or import a .gmchar file; this game cannot start without one.

basePicker.storyLead: A story is built over a world, whose canon becomes the story bible.
basePicker.characterLead: A character can be standalone, tied to a world, or based on a built-in classic whose public canon guides the architect.
basePicker.noBaseDescription: A portable hero not tied to a world, suitable for any story.
basePicker.noWorldsForStory: There are no worlds yet. Create one first, because a story requires a world.
basePicker.noWorldsCharacter: There are no worlds yet, but a character can be created without a base.
basePicker.noWorldsCharacterWithBuiltin: There are no worlds yet, but a character can be standalone or based on a built-in classic.
basePicker.optionalStory: Optional: a story from “{{world}}”. The hero will become its protagonist.
basePicker.noStoryDescription: Use only the world as a base, so the hero can fit any of its stories.
basePicker.noAuthoredStories: This world has no authored stories yet.
